description:
Measure the direct geodesic distances in kilometers between three specific pairs of cities: New York (USA) to London (UK), Tokyo (Japan) to Sydney (Australia), and Buenos Aires (Argentina) to Cape Town (South Africa). Use the cities layer located at `~/gvsig_data/cities/ne_110m_populated_places.shp` within the `countries_base` project to identify the locations. Create a text file at `~/gvsig_data/exports/distances.txt` containing the results in the following format:

New York-London: <value> km
Tokyo-Sydney: <value> km
Buenos Aires-Cape Town: <value> km
